𝗧𝗘𝗟𝗘𝗚𝗥𝗔𝗠-𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗘 | To provide users with a free, unlimited, and secure cloud storage solution by leveraging their existing Telegram accounts.  🌟 Rising Fast!

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide users with a free, unlimited, and secure cloud storage solution by leveraging their existing Telegram accounts.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ Auto-Updates
✅ Media Streaming
✅ PDF Viewer
✅ Drag & Drop
✅ Thumbnail Previews
✅ Folder Management
✅ Privacy Focused
✅ Cross-Platform


━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Telegram Drive is an open-source desktop application that transforms your Telegram account into a secure, unlimited cloud storage solution. It provides a familiar file explorer interface for managing files directly on Telegram's servers using its API.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/caamer20/Telegram-Drive

𝗛𝗬𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗙𝗥𝗔𝗠𝗘𝗦 | To enable AI agents and developers to easily create and render video content using HTML and CSS, streamlining the video production workflow.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To enable AI agents and developers to easily create and render video content using HTML and CSS, streamlining the video production workflow.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ HTML-based video rendering framework
✅ Integration with AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex)
✅ Support for GSAP animations
✅ AI agent skills for generating compositions and animations
✅ CLI commands for rendering
✅ Puppeteer for rendering
✅ FFmpeg for video processing


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Hyperframes is an open-source video rendering framework that allows users to create video compositions using HTML and CSS. It integrates with AI agents to facilitate the creation process, enabling users to describe desired videos and have the AI generate the HTML/CSS code for rendering.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗢𝗠𝗡𝗜𝗚𝗘𝗧 | To provide a unified desktop environment for downloading and studying online courses and digital books, enhancing the learning experience with integrated study tools and content management.  🔥 Super Hot!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a unified desktop environment for downloading and studying online courses and digital books, enhancing the learning experience with integrated study tools and content management.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Apr 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✅ Download and watch online courses (Hotmart, Udemy, Kiwify, etc.)
✅ Read PDFs and EPUBs with highlights, bookmarks, and focus mode
✅ Timestamped notes linked to video playback
✅ Spaced repetition flashcards for studying
✅ Focus timer
✅ Download videos from YouTube, Instagram, TikTok
✅ Torrent downloads
✅ Cross-platform desktop application (Windows, macOS, Linux)

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

OmniGet is an open-source desktop application designed for efficient online learning and content consumption. It allows users to download courses from various platforms and read digital books (PDF, EPUB) within the app, offering features like timestamped notes, flashcards, and focus modes to enhance studying. Additionally, it supports downloading videos from social media and torrents.
